Interface MacPowerSource.PowerSourceFactory

Enclosing class:
MacPowerSource
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface protected static interface MacPowerSource.PowerSourceFactory
Creates a concrete (JNA or FFM) Mac power source from the computed battery fields.
